heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 8912 Authorization of appropriations
text: For the expenses of carrying out the carbon dioxide study authorized by (as determined by the Office of Science and Technology Policy) there are authorized to be appropriated such sums, not exceeding $3,000,000 in the aggregate, as may be necessary. At least 80 percent of any amounts appropriated pursuant to the preceding sentence shall be provided to the National Academy of Sciences.section 8911 of this title
